words.definition: n. 龙, 凶暴的人\n[法] 凶恶的人, 凶恶严厉的监护人
n. 上帝, 创造者, 创作者
words.example: ...Ian Fleming, the creator of James Bond.
words.exampleTranslation: …伊恩·弗莱明，詹姆斯·邦德的创作者。

words.definition: a. 选举人的, 选举的, (有关)选举的\n[法] 选举的, 选举人的, 由选举人组成的
vt. 告发, 起诉, 彻底进行, 执行, 从事\nvi. 告发, 起诉, 作检察官
words.example: Mrs Lynn Smith, prosecuting, said the offence took place on January 27.
words.exampleTranslation: 控方律师林恩·史密斯夫人称案件发生于1月27日。

words.definition: vi. 插入, 调停, 干涉\n[经] 进场干预
words.example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
words.exampleTranslation: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

words.definition: n. 赤热, 光辉, 热情, 热烈, 红光\nvi. 发红光, 红光焕发, 发热, 洋溢, 激动
words.example: The moisturizer gave my face a healthy glow that lasted all day.
words.exampleTranslation: 这种润肤霜给我脸上带来了持续整天的一种健康的红光。

words.definition: vt. 具体表达, 使具体化\n[经] 合并, 具体化, 具体表现
words.example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
words.exampleTranslation: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

words.definition: a. 钝的, 无趣的, 呆滞的, 阴暗的\nvt. 使迟钝, 使阴暗, 缓和\nvi. 变迟钝, 减少
words.tag: gk cet4 cet6 ky toefl ielts gre
words.example: Life is never dull when Elizabeth is here.
words.exampleTranslation: 有伊丽莎白在这里生活绝不会无聊。

words.definition: n. 小块地毯, 揭露某人
words.example: The old lady was seated in her chair at the window, a rug over her knees.
words.exampleTranslation: 这位老妇人坐在靠窗的椅子上，膝上盖着一块小毛毯。

words.definition: n. 袭击, 突袭, 搜捕\nv. 奇袭, 搜捕\n[计] 廉价磁盘冗余阵列
words.tag: cet4 cet6 ky toefl ielts gre
words.example: a bombing raid
words.exampleTranslation: 轰炸
